name: proxywar-agent-starter
description: LLM-backed external agent starter for Proxy War matches.

scripts.check: node --check simple-agent.mjs && node --check relay-worker.mjs && node --check smoke-test.mjs && node --check starter-framework.mjs && node -e "import('./starter-framework.mjs').then((m)=>{if(!m.createStarterAgent||!m.validateDecisionOutput||!m.createHealthResponse||!m.createLlmCompleteFromEnv) throw new Error('starter exports missing'); console.log('starter exports ok')})"
